title: microdon orbicularis
intro: Microdon orbicularis, also known as the "button bush," is a flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing skin irritations. The herbal preparations of Microdon orbicularis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
